en: And when he returned to Capernaum after some days, it was reported that he was at home.
zh: 過了些日子，耶穌再回到迦百農。一聽說他在屋子裡，

en: And many were gathered together, so that there was no more room, not even at the door. And he was preaching the word to them.
zh: 許多人就都來聚集，甚至連門前都沒有地方了，耶穌就對他們講道。

en: And they came, bringing to him a paralytic carried by four men.
zh: 那時有人把一個癱子帶到耶穌那裡，是由四個人抬來的。

en: And when they could not get near him because of the crowd, they removed the roof above him, and when they had made an opening, they let down the bed on which the paralytic lay.
zh: 因為人擠，不能帶到他面前，就對著耶穌所在的地方，拆去房頂；拆通了，就把癱子連人帶褥子縋了下去。

en: And when Jesus saw their faith, he said to the paralytic, "My son, your sins are forgiven."
zh: 耶穌看見他們的信心，就對癱子說：“孩子，你的罪赦了。”

en: Now some of the scribes were sitting there, questioning in their hearts,
zh: 當時有幾個經學家也坐在那裡，心裡議論說：

en: "Why does this man speak like that? He is blaspheming! Who can forgive sins but God alone?"
zh: “這個人為甚麼這樣說話？他說僭妄的話了。除了 神一位以外，誰能赦罪呢？”

en: And immediately Jesus, perceiving in his spirit that they thus questioned within themselves, said to them, "Why do you question these things in your hearts?
zh: 耶穌心裡立刻知道他們這樣議論，就對他們說：“你們心裡為甚麼議論這事？

en: Which is easier, to say to the paralytic, 'Your sins are forgiven,' or to say, 'Rise, take up your bed and walk'?
zh: 對癱子說‘你的罪赦了’，或說‘起來，拿著你的褥子走’，哪一樣容易呢？

en: But that you may know that the Son of Man has authority on earth to forgive sins"- he said to the paralytic-
zh: 然而為了要你們知道人子在地上有赦罪的權柄，

en: "I say to you, rise, pick up your bed, and go home."
zh: 我吩咐你，起來，拿起你的褥子，回家去吧。”

en: And he rose and immediately picked up his bed and went out before them all, so that they were all amazed and glorified God, saying, "We never saw anything like this!"
zh: 那人就起來，立刻拿著褥子，當眾出去了。眾人都非常驚奇，頌讚 神，說：“我們從來沒有見過這樣的事。”

en: He went out again beside the sea, and all the crowd was coming to him, and he was teaching them.
zh: 耶穌又出去，到了加利利海邊；眾人都到他面前來，他就教導他們。

en: And as he passed by, he saw Levi the son of Alphaeus sitting at the tax booth, and he said to him, "Follow me." And he rose and followed him.
zh: 他往前走的時候，看見亞勒腓的兒子利未坐在稅關那裡，就對他說：“來跟從我！”他就起來跟從了耶穌。

en: And as he reclined at table in his house, many tax collectors and sinners were reclining with Jesus and his disciples, for there were many who followed him.
zh: 後來耶穌在利未家裡吃飯，有很多稅吏和罪人也來與他和門徒一起吃飯；因為這樣的人很多，並且他們已經跟隨了耶穌。

en: And the scribes of the Pharisees, when they saw that he was eating with sinners and tax collectors, said to his disciples, "Why does he eat with tax collectors and sinners?"
zh: 法利賽派的經學家，看見耶穌與罪人和稅吏一起吃飯，就對耶穌的門徒說：“他跟稅吏和罪人一起吃飯嗎？”

en: And when Jesus heard it, he said to them, "Those who are well have no need of a physician, but those who are sick. I came not to call the righteous, but sinners."
zh: 耶穌聽見了，就對他們說：“健康的人不需要醫生，有病的人才需要；我來不是要召義人，而是要召罪人。”

en: Now John's disciples and the Pharisees were fasting. And people came and said to him, "Why do John's disciples and the disciples of the Pharisees fast, but your disciples do not fast?"
zh: 約翰的門徒和法利賽人正在禁食，有人來問耶穌說：“為甚麼約翰的門徒和法利賽人的門徒常常禁食，你的門徒卻不禁食呢？”

en: And Jesus said to them, "Can the wedding guests fast while the bridegroom is with them? As long as they have the bridegroom with them, they cannot fast.
zh: 耶穌回答：“新郎跟賓客在一起的時候，賓客怎能禁食呢？只要新郎還在，就不能禁食。

en: The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast in that day.
zh: 但日子到了，新郎要被取去，離開他們，那一天他們就要禁食了。

en: No one sews a piece of unshrunk cloth on an old garment. If he does, the patch tears away from it, the new from the old, and a worse tear is made.
zh: 沒有人會把一塊新布縫在舊衣服上，如果這樣，新的布就會把舊衣服扯破，裂開的地方就更大了。

en: And no one puts new wine into old wineskins. If he does, the wine will burst the skins- and the wine is destroyed, and so are the skins. But new wine is for fresh wineskins."
zh: 也沒有人會把新酒裝在舊皮袋裡，如果這樣，酒就會把皮袋脹破，酒和皮袋都損壞了；新酒總該裝在新皮袋裡。”

en: One Sabbath he was going through the grainfields, and as they made their way, his disciples began to pluck heads of grain.
zh: 有一次，在安息日，耶穌從麥田經過，他的門徒一面走路，一面摘麥穗。

en: And the Pharisees were saying to him, "Look, why are they doing what is not lawful on the Sabbath?"
zh: 法利賽人對耶穌說：“你看，他們為甚麼作安息日不可作的事？”

en: And he said to them, "Have you never read what David did, when he was in need and was hungry, he and those who were with him:
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“大衛和跟他一起的人在飢餓缺食的時候所作的，你們沒有念過嗎？

en: how he entered the house of God, in the time of Abiathar the high priest, and ate the bread of the Presence, which it is not lawful for any but the priests to eat, and also gave it to those who were with him?"
zh: 他不是在亞比亞他作大祭司的時候，進了 神的殿，吃了除祭司以外誰都不可以吃的陳設餅，而且還給跟他在一起的人吃嗎？”

en: And he said to them, "The Sabbath was made for man, not man for the Sabbath.
zh: 耶穌又告訴他們：“安息日是為人設立的，人並不是為安息日設立的。

en: So the Son of Man is lord even of the Sabbath."
zh: 這樣，人子也是安息日的主。”
